arts.ttl: 'We got what we deserved': Wigan Athletic boss on late Reading comeback victory
arts.sum: ''We got what we deserved' said then-Wigan Athletic manager Shaun Maloney on Saturday's 2-1 win for Reading. Maloney, who won the FA Cup with the Latics as a player and was manager since 2023, was sacked on Sunday following the loss to the Royals, sitting 15th in League One. Noel Hunt side, now six unbeaten in League One, impressed at the Brick Community Stadium, deservedly turning around a narrow deficit to pick up another win. Jayden Wareham and Tyler Bindon did the damage in the final 20 minutes, having gone behind earlier in the second half through Jason Kerr.
